---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Aura Memory
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could work. Code examples are welcome:

```python
# Example of desired API
brain = Aura("./data")
brain.new_feature(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Priority

How important is this for your project?
- [ ] Critical — blocking my adoption of Aura
- [ ] High — significant improvement to my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor enhancement
